author.description: Retired US Marine, Border Patrol Agent, Minister, Husband and highly-trained professional Great-Grandpa ~ on Substack!

tweets.text:
"Wow,  @GregoryKBovino;
Under @POTUS  Trump and @SecMullinDHS, "criminal" illegal aliens are not welcome... but those cozy 8 USC 1324 violators? De facto Amnesty. 

And the smugglers, NGOs, employers, and sanctuary officials openly transporting, harboring, shielding, and encouraging them? Apparently those are just 'compassionate community partners' — not actual criminals under this @DHS. 

But that's ok. Once the rob, rape or murder you or someone you love, then they will be on the "targeted" list. 

NICE priorities, guys. Real tough on the whole 'rule of law' thing." 
https://t.co/9m2LxPB8eV
